title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 272.010 - Field to be enclosed by fence
text:
272.010.  Field to be enclosed by fence. — All fields and enclosures where animals are kept shall be enclosed by a lawful fence as defined in section 272.020.
(RSMo 1939 § 14569, A.L. 2001 H.B. 219 merged with S.B. 462) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12906; 1919 § 5511; 1909 § 6454 
Railroad companies to maintain lawful fence; gates and cattle guards, where, 389.650
